title: switch statements should cover all cases
description: "switch" statements should cover all casesAnalyze your codeintentionality-completemaintainabilityCode SmellsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?More InfoFor completeness, aswitchover the values of anenummust either address each value in theenumor contain adefaultcase.switchstatements that are not overenummust end with adefaultcase.This rule is a more nuanced version ofS131. UseS131if you want to require adefaultcase for everyswitcheven if it already handles all enumerators of anenum. Otherwise, use this rule.Noncompliant code exampletypedef enum {APPLE, GRAPE, KIWI} fruit; void example(fruit f, int i) { switch (f) { // Noncompliant; no case for KIWI case APPLE: //..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Switch statement should cover all cases or include a default clause for completeness
